step_description: Collection index usage and scan statistics
narrative_hint: orders collection has 48,420 collection scans versus 284,200 index scans — about 15% of queries are doing full scans. analytics collection has 18,420 collection scans against a 28GB collection — extremely expensive. audit collection has 84,200 collection scans with only one index, suggesting many queries are not using the available index. Claude should recommend: (1) db.orders.createIndex({customer_id: 1}) (2) db.analytics.createIndex({event_type: 1, date: 1}) (3) review audit collection query patterns for index opportunities.
